Captopril_Baseline.description: Systolic blood pressure at baseline for patients in the Captopril group. Same patients as Captopril_After1week.

Captopril_After1week.description: Systolic blood pressure after one week of treatment for patients in the Captopril group. Same patients as Captopril_Baseline.

Placebo_Baseline.description: Systolic blood pressure at baseline for patients in the Placebo group. Same patients as Placebo_After1week.

Placebo_After1week.description: Systolic blood pressure after one week of treatment for patients in the Placebo group. Same patients as Placebo_Baseline.
